expectations.text: Avoids CRM-transactional language (touch base, circle back, ping, nurture)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Does not frame relationships as metrics (engagement, conversion, ROI)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Response references specific people with specific context, not generic advice
expectations.evidence: References Sam's career transition, consulting year one, the client intro he made two years ago

expectations.text: Frames the task relationally (care, curiosity, gratitude) not transactionally (opportunity, leverage)
expectations.evidence: 'attention and memory as the offer', 'witness him', 'field doesn't owe you a return'

expectations.text: Acknowledges/names the shame or awkwardness, doesn't bypass it
expectations.evidence: Dedicated opening section 'First: the shame' explicitly explores shame-driven outreach as apology-performance

expectations.text: Suggested reach-out is NOT 'catch up over coffee' generic — has specific entry point
expectations.evidence: Specific entry: downstream story of what intro produced, 'first year of consulting' peer comparison
